Uses of Interface
org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream.TokenReader

Packages that use TokenReader
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.marshall.cbor
CBOR (Concise Binary Object Representation) marshalling support per RFC 8949.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json
JSON Marshalling Support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5
JSON5 Marshalling Support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5l
JSON5L (JSON5 Lines) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonl
JSONL (JSON Lines) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.marshaller
Marshallers
org.apache.juneau.marshall.msgpack
MessagePack Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream
Public low-level token-streaming API (pull parser + push generator) shared by every Juneau format.

  • Uses of TokenReader in org.apache.juneau.marshall.cbor

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.marshall.cbor that implement TokenReader
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    CborTokenReader
    Reference implementation of the public TokenReader surface for the CBOR format (RFC 8949).
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.marshall.cbor that return TokenReader
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    TokenReader
    CborParser.parseTokens(Object input)
    Convenience delegator that opens a CborTokenReader over the input using default session arguments (mirrors Parser.parse(Object, Class)).
    TokenReader
    CborParserSession.parseTokens(Object input)
    Opens a low-level pull-parser cursor over a CBOR document, bound to this live session.

  • Uses of TokenReader in org.apache.juneau.marshall.json

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.marshall.json that implement TokenReader
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    JsonTokenReader
    Reference implementation of the public TokenReader surface for the JSON format.
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.marshall.json that return TokenReader
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    TokenReader
    JsonParser.parseTokens(Object input)
    Convenience delegator that opens a JsonTokenReader over the input using default session arguments (mirrors Parser.parse(Object, Class)).
    TokenReader
    JsonParserSession.parseTokens(Object input)
    Opens a low-level pull-parser cursor over a JSON document, bound to this session's live BeanSession/MarshallingContext.

    Marshaller.fromTokens(Object input)

    Opens a low-level pull-parser cursor over a MessagePack document, bound to this live session.
